problem_statement: Future MAF Python-to-Rust runtime binding cannot be reconsidered until the ABI/CLI surface is separated from execution authority and recorded as a typed witness with open subprocess, fixture parity, and failure-path gaps.
success_criteria: MafAbiCliContractWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example

MafAbiCliContractWitness binds MAF CLI manifest and entry digests, preceding MafReceiptParityWitness refs, open argument/output gap refs, failure receipt ref, UAO ref, LifeMeaningJudgment ref, and receipt refs

MafAbiCliContractWitness blocks CLI execution, subprocess execution, Rust execution, Python-to-Rust binding, ABI stability claims, connector calls, network calls, secret access, filesystem writes, runtime dispatch, terminal closure, and success claims
MafAbiCliContractWitness rejects authority drift, digest drift, gap closure without evidence, missing future witnesses, secret markers, receipt ref drift, and summary count drift
constraints: accepted_argument_schema_ref and output_receipt_schema_ref remain gap refs
subprocess effect boundary, deterministic fixture parity, and failure receipt path witnesses remain required
all source digests must match repository-local source files
